race.comment: IMMORTAL SHIELD (6) rallied in the concluding stages to score by 0.9 lengths last start over 1406m at Roebourne at the second run of the campaign. Likely to measure up again. ADRETT (2) turned things around last start and landed the prize by 3 lengths over 1200m at Marble Bar. Must raise the bar but another big run is on the cards. KIA ORA TATOU (7) was in contention all the way and fought on for third last start over 1200m at Marble Bar, making it two minor placings in a row. Meets some better types this time but a win is not out of the question. IMPERIALIZE (1) raced on the pace over 1200m at this track last time and went on to win by 2.5 lengths. Should be prominent in the run again despite the awkward gate. Solid claims. MISSILE GIRL (5) is building nicely and can make her presence felt.
